chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-8264 of 2019 Syed Khalid Aziz Zaidi Versus Government of Sindh & others Date Order with signature of Judge For orders as to maintainability of petition. Dated: 05.05.2025 None present. -.-.- This is an old case of 2019 which is over six years old. It was last fixed on 14.10.2020 which is over five years ago, which is subject to maintainability. During the last five years learned counsel for the petitioner has failed to pursue this petition diligently. Today learned counsel for the petitioner is called absent without intimation and the question of maintainability of the petition remains unresolved. It appears that the petitioner has lost interest in pursuing this petition which is accordingly dismissed for non-prosecution along with pending application. Head of Const. Benches Judge
